---
title: "Format Field Output Settings"
---

You can define and manage format options to standardize your field output during field extraction.

To define and manage format options:

1.  In the Edit Field pane, under the Settings tab, click Add in the Format box. The Format menu is displayed.

![](data:image/gif;base64,)
2.  Do any of the following:
-  Remove Characters: Select this option to specify one or more characters to remove (Examples: punctuation or special symbols). Click Save.
-  Change Date Format: Select this option to select a date format from a list of predefined date formats (Examples: MM/DD/YYYY, DD-MM-YYYY). Click Save.
-  Select Casing: Select this option to convert text to uppercase, lowercase, or sentence case. Click Save.
-  Truncate: Select this option to truncate characters from the extraction output. Click Save.
Note: To delete any of the formatting rules, click the Delete icon ![](data:image/gif;base64,) next to the formatting option.
